title: Add view mode switching command
description:
Add CLI command to switch between Initiatives/Epics/Issues views.

Command: kbs console view <mode>
  where mode is: initiatives | epics | issues

Behavior:
- Updates viewMode state in frontend
- Updates localStorage (kanbus.console.viewMode)
- Updates URL to /{basePath}/{viewMode}/
- Filters board to show only issues of selected type
- Preserves search query and other filters

Implementation:
- Add ViewModeChanged UIControl event
- Frontend handler updates viewMode via setViewMode
- Should match existing AnimatedSelector behavior exactly
creator: ryan.porter
